description: Rocket.Chat is open at the login screen. Log in with username 'admin' and password 'Admin1234!'. Create a new custom role named 'release-manager' with the description 'Manages release channels and announcements' and the scope 'Users'. Grant this role the following permissions: pin-message, archive-room, create-c, and edit-room. Assign the 'release-manager' role to the user 'agent.user', ensuring they also retain their default 'user' role.
